hooks.command: branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if [ -z "$branch" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$branch" | grep -qE '^(main|master|develop|release/|hotfix)'; then echo "BLOCKED: on protected branch '$branch'. Create a feature branch first:"; echo "  git checkout -b feature/ID-slug"; exit 1; fi
